findings: The 'system/coherent_continuation' check has a 0% pass rate across all variants, indicating that the criterion text is likely miscalibrated.
The 'quality/agent1/concise' check has a near-floor pass rate of 3%, suggesting that the criterion text may not accurately reflect what is achievable or expected in practice.

rubric_overrides.quality/agent1/concise: Ensure that responses are succinct and avoid unnecessary repetition, while still providing all necessary information to the borrower.
rubric_overrides.system/coherent_continuation: Ensure that the conversation flows logically from one point to the next, maintaining context and relevance throughout the interaction.

quality/agent1/concise.after: Ensure that responses are succinct and avoid unnecessary repetition, while still providing all necessary information to the borrower.

system/coherent_continuation.after: Ensure that the conversation flows logically from one point to the next, maintaining context and relevance throughout the interaction.

findings: The 'system/coherent_continuation' check has a 0% pass rate across all variants, indicating that the criterion text is likely miscalibrated.
The 'quality/agent1/concise' check has a near-floor pass rate of 3%, suggesting that the criterion text may not accurately reflect what is achievable or expected in practice.

rubric_overrides.quality/agent1/concise: Ensure that responses are succinct and avoid unnecessary repetition, while still providing all necessary information to the borrower.
rubric_overrides.system/coherent_continuation: Ensure that the conversation flows logically from one point to the next, maintaining context and relevance throughout the interaction.

evidence.rationale: The 'system/coherent_continuation' check at 0% pass rate suggests a fundamental issue with the criterion text, as it is unlikely that all agents fail to maintain coherent conversation flow. Similarly, the 'quality/agent1/concise' check's near-floor pass rate indicates that the current criterion may not align with practical expectations or the nature of the conversations, necessitating a revision to better capture the intended quality of conciseness.

features: Checklist-based scoring (93 binary checks per conversation)
Structured strategy mutations (goals, turn allocation, persona tactics)
Sliding window meta-eval with transcript evidence
Rubric rewrites by meta-eval (2 criteria rewritten)
